pandoc 
  to: html
  output-file: themes.html
  standalone: true
  title-prefix: Drone-Willow-Bumblebee
  section-divs: true
  html-math-method: mathjax
  wrap: none
  default-image-extension: png
  toc: true
  
metadata
  document-css: false
  link-citations: true
  date-format: long
  lang: en
  theme:
    light:
      - minty
      - styles.scss
    dark:
      - superhero
      - styles.scss
      - dark-theme-style.scss
  lightbox: true

Output created: _site\themes.html

Watching files for changes
Browse at http://localhost:7160/themes.html
